metadata.description: Batch 15 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 1401-1500; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: to stop someone or something briefly
words.example: Please do not interrupt the speaker.

words.definitionEn: a formal meeting where questions are asked
words.definitionTh: การสัมภาษณ์ / สัมภาษณ์

words.definitionEn: to the inside of something
words.example: Pour the mixture into the tank.

words.definitionEn: to present someone or something for the first time
words.definitionTh: แนะนำ / นำเสนอ
words.example: Let me introduce the new system.

words.definitionEn: the act of presenting something for the first time
words.definitionTh: การแนะนำ / บทนำ
words.example: The manual begins with an introduction.

words.definitionEn: to create something that did not exist before
a newly created device or process
words.definitionTh: สิ่งประดิษฐ์
words.example: The telephone was an important invention.

words.definitionEn: to put money, time, or effort into something for future benefit
words.example: The company will invest in automation.

words.definitionEn: to examine something carefully to discover facts
words.definitionTh: ตรวจสอบ / สืบสวน

words.definitionEn: a careful examination to discover facts
words.definitionTh: การตรวจสอบ / การสืบสวน

words.definitionEn: money, time, or effort used for future benefit
a request asking someone to attend or participate
to ask someone to attend or participate
words.example: We invited the supplier to the meeting.

words.definitionEn: to include someone or something as a necessary part
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวข้อง / รวมถึง
words.example: The task involves checking three sensors.

words.definitionEn: taking part in or connected with something
words.definitionTh: มีส่วนร่วม / เกี่ยวข้อง

words.definitionEn: a strong metal; to make clothes smooth with heat
words.definitionTh: เหล็ก / รีดผ้า
words.example: The frame is made of iron.

words.definitionEn: land completely surrounded by water
an important problem or subject; to officially provide
words.definitionTh: ประเด็น / ออกให้

words.definitionEn: information technology
words.definitionTh: เทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ
words.example: Contact the IT team for support.

words.definitionEn: used to refer to a thing, animal, or situation
words.example: The machine stopped because it overheated.

words.definitionEn: one thing in a list, group, or collection
words.definitionTh: รายการ / สิ่งของ
words.example: Check each item on the list.

words.definitionEn: belonging to a thing or animal
used when a thing is both subject and object
a short coat worn on the upper body
words.definitionTh: เสื้อแจ็กเก็ต

words.definitionEn: fruit preserved with sugar; a situation where something is stuck
words.definitionTh: แยม / การติดขัด
words.example: A paper jam stopped the printer.

words.definitionEn: the first month of the year
a style of music with strong rhythms and improvisation
trousers made from denim
words.definitionTh: กางเกงยีนส์

words.definitionEn: decorative objects worn on the body
words.definitionTh: เครื่องประดับ
words.example: She keeps her jewellery in a box.

words.definitionEn: paid work or a particular task
words.definitionTh: งาน / อาชีพ

words.definitionEn: to become part of a group or connect things
words.definitionTh: เข้าร่วม / เชื่อมต่อ

words.definitionEn: something said to make people laugh; to speak humorously
words.definitionTh: เรื่องตลก / พูดเล่น

words.definitionEn: a magazine or regular record of events
words.definitionTh: วารสาร / บันทึก
words.example: The study appeared in a scientific journal.

words.definitionEn: a person who reports news
the act of travelling from one place to another
words.definitionTh: การเดินทาง
words.example: The train journey took two hours.

words.definitionEn: a feeling of great happiness
words.example: The news brought her great joy.

words.definitionEn: a person who decides legal cases; to form an opinion
words.definitionTh: ผู้พิพากษา / ตัดสิน
words.example: Do not judge the result too quickly.

words.definitionEn: an opinion or decision based on careful thought
words.definitionTh: การตัดสิน / วิจารณญาณ

words.definitionEn: liquid from fruit or vegetables
the seventh month of the year
words.example: The system was installed in July.

words.definitionEn: to push yourself into the air; a sudden increase
words.definitionTh: กระโดด / การเพิ่มขึ้นฉับพลัน

words.definitionEn: the sixth month of the year
lower in rank or younger
words.definitionTh: ระดับต้น / อาวุโสต่ำกว่า
words.example: A junior engineer checked the drawing.

words.definitionEn: exactly, only, or a very short time ago
words.definitionTh: เพิ่ง / เพียง / พอดี

words.definitionEn: fair treatment according to law or morality
words.definitionTh: ความยุติธรรม

words.definitionEn: to give a good reason for something
words.definitionTh: ให้เหตุผลสนับสนุน

words.definitionEn: very interested or eager
words.definitionTh: กระตือรือร้น / สนใจมาก

words.definitionEn: to continue to have or maintain something
words.definitionTh: เก็บ / รักษา

words.definitionEn: a tool for a lock; very important; to enter information
words.definitionTh: กุญแจ / สำคัญ / ป้อนข้อมูล

words.definitionEn: a set of keys used to type into a computer
to hit with the foot; an act of hitting with the foot
words.definitionTh: เตะ / การเตะ

words.definitionEn: a child
words.example: The kids played in the park.

words.definitionEn: to cause someone or something to die
words.definitionTh: ฆ่า / ทำให้ตาย

words.definitionEn: the act of causing death
a unit of distance equal to 1,000 metres
words.example: The factory is five kilometres away.

words.definitionEn: a group of things with similar characteristics
words.definitionTh: ชนิด / ประเภท
words.example: What kind of sensor is this?

words.definitionEn: caring, helpful, and considerate
words.example: She was kind to the new employee.

words.definitionEn: a male ruler of a country
words.example: The king lived in the palace.

words.definitionEn: to touch with the lips as a sign of affection
words.definitionTh: จูบ / การจูบ

words.definitionEn: a room where food is prepared
the joint in the middle of the leg
a cutting tool with a blade
to hit a surface to make a sound; such a sound
words.definitionTh: เคาะ / เสียงเคาะ

words.definitionEn: to have information or understanding
words.example: I know how the system works.

words.definitionEn: information and understanding gained through experience
a laboratory
words.definitionTh: ห้องปฏิบัติการ
words.example: The sample was tested in the lab.

words.definitionEn: a piece of information attached to something; to mark it
words.definitionTh: ฉลาก / ติดฉลาก

words.definitionEn: a room or building used for scientific work
words.definitionTh: ห้องปฏิบัติการ

words.definitionEn: physical work or workers as a group
words.example: The process requires less manual labour.

words.definitionEn: not enough of something; to not have enough
words.definitionTh: การขาด / ขาดแคลน
words.example: A lack of data delayed the decision.

words.definitionEn: a polite word for a woman
a large area of water surrounded by land
a device that produces light
the surface of the earth; to arrive on the ground
words.definitionTh: ที่ดิน / ลงจอด

words.definitionEn: the visible features of an area of land
a system of words used for communication
a portable computer
words.example: She uses a laptop at work.

words.definitionEn: big in size or amount
words.example: The factory has a large warehouse.

words.definitionEn: mainly or mostly
coming after all others; the final one
words.example: This is the last item on the list.

words.definitionEn: to continue for a period of time
words.definitionTh: กินเวลา / คงอยู่

words.definitionEn: after the expected or usual time
words.definitionTh: สาย / ล่าช้า

words.definitionEn: after the present or a stated time
most recent
to make sounds showing amusement; such a sound
words.definitionTh: หัวเราะ / เสียงหัวเราะ

words.definitionEn: the sound or act of laughing
words.definitionTh: เสียงหัวเราะ

words.definitionEn: to start or introduce something; the act of doing so
words.definitionTh: เปิดตัว / การเปิดตัว
words.example: The company launched a new product.

words.definitionEn: a rule made by a government
words.example: The company must follow the law.

words.definitionEn: a person qualified to give legal advice
to put something down carefully
words.example: Lay the cable on the floor.

words.definitionEn: a level or thickness of material over a surface
words.example: Apply a thin layer of paint.

words.definitionEn: not willing to work or make an effort
words.example: The lazy student avoided the task.

words.definitionEn: to guide or be in charge; the leading position
a person who leads a group
words.example: The team leader approved the plan.

words.definitionEn: the ability or position of leading people
most important or successful
words.definitionTh: ชั้นนำ / สำคัญ
words.example: She works for a leading company.

words.definitionEn: a flat green part of a plant
words.example: A leaf fell from the tree.

words.definitionEn: a group of sports teams or organizations
words.definitionTh: ลีก / กลุ่ม
words.example: The club joined the national league.

words.definitionEn: to bend or rest against something
words.example: Do not lean against the guard.

words.definitionEn: to gain knowledge or skill
